title: "Presentiment Is That Long Shadow On The Lawn"
content:
Presentiment is that long shadow on the lawn
    Indicative that suns go down;
    The notice to the startled grass
    That darkness is about to pass.
meaning:
""Presentiment Is That Long Shadow On The Lawn"" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
